content.full_text:
June 23, 2010

Margaret Pennington
9472 Brookmont Ct.
Elk Grove, CA 95624

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our file No. W-10-065

Dear Ms. Pennington:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above-captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation on April 15, 2010.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Cynthia A. Jones
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistant Division
